title: REI Cheat Keybind
description: Adds a keybind to toggle cheat mode on or off on REI's item menu.
body:
![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/thakyZ/REICheatKeybind?color=informational&style=flat-square)
![GitHub release (latest by date)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/thakyZ/REICheatKeybind?style=flat-square)   

Adds a keybind to toggle cheat mode on or off on REI's item menu.

The keybind is `Numpad Divide` by default.

This is for Minecraft version 1.16.x and 1.17.x. I will think about making it for 1.18.x as well soon.

Requires [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-enough-items)
